name: Risotto Con Porcini Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces fresh porcini mushrooms, sliced or mixed wild mushrooms
6 1/2 cups hot chicken or veal stock
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium casserole, heat the olive oil over low heat.
2. Add the onion and shallots, and sauté until golden brown.
3. Stir in the mushrooms and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the rice and stir to coat it with oil.
5. Pour in the white wine and stir well.
6. Gradually add hot stock (about 1/2 cup at a time), stirring constantly.
7. Continue adding stock in small batches, allowing each portion to be absorbed before adding more, until all liquid is absorbed and the rice mixture is creamy al dente.
8. Remove from heat, stir in butter and cheese.
9. Season with pepper to taste and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
